title: PFRDA (Employees Services) (Amendment) Regulations, 2020
text: 1901 GI/2020 (1) xxxGIDExxx EXTRAORDINARY III 4 PART III Section 4 PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY 158] 28, 2020 8, 1942 No. 158] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, APRIL 28, 2020/VAISAKHA 8, 1942 CG-DL-E-28042020-219207 45649/2020/HR Dept 723 -- 1 of 3 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III SEC. 4] III PENSION FUND REGULATORY AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th April, 2020 PENSION FUND REGULATORY AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY ) (AMENDMENT) REGULATIONS, 2020 F. No. PFRDA/12/RGL/139/11 In exercise of the powers conferred by sub section (2) of section 11 read with sub clause (b) of sub section (2) of section 52 of the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 2013 (Act no. 23 of 2013), the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Pension Fund Regulatory and - 1. These regulations maybe called the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (Employe 2. These regulations shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 3. 2015:- In regulation 6, in the schedule of clause (b) of sub-regulation (4), - (a) In column 3 of row 3, for qualification for Grade D, E and F, the existing educational qualification requirements shall be substituted with the following clauses, namely,:- recognized university, CA, CFA, CS, CWA for officers in the General Stream. Mas Econometrics for officers in the Research Stream. 45649/2020/HR Dept 724 -- 2 of 3 -- [ III 4] 3 technology/ comp with a post graduate qualification (minimum 2 years duration) in computers/ information technology for (b) In column 3 of row 4, maximum age SUPRATIM BANDYOPADHYAY, Chairperson [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./19/2020-21] Footnote : 1.
